releases.author: sagersmith8
releases.description:
## Journal mention tracking (complete)

Auto-maintains `people:` and `locations:` frontmatter when inserting via picker commands.

### Highlights
- Person and location picker inserts update frontmatter (deduped)
- Group inserts expand `members:` into `people:`
- Settings toggle to disable tracking
- Toasts when lists change; graceful YAML error handling
- Ghost create flows track mentions; link-only ghosts do not

### Install
**BRAT:** Add beta plugin `sagersmith8/obsidian-journal-utils` and update to 1.2.0.

**Community Plugins catalog:** Not listed yet — see README for how to submit to obsidian-releases if you want public discovery without BRAT.

### Full behavior
See [README](https://github.com/sagersmith8/obsidian-journal-utils#mention-tracking).
releases.name: 1.2.0 — Mention tracking

releases.author: sagersmith8
releases.description:
## Notices and ghost create tracking

- Toast when frontmatter actually changes: "Added Joy to people"
- No toast on dedupe / no-op
- YAML error toast if frontmatter cannot be updated (body link still inserts)
- Ghost → **Create person/location** now updates frontmatter
- Ghost → **Insert link only** still skips frontmatter

## Test plan

1. Insert new person → see "Added Joy to people" toast
2. Insert same person again → no mention toast
3. Ghost → Create person → `people:` updated + toast
4. Ghost → Insert link only → body only, no mention toast

releases.author: sagersmith8
releases.description:
## Group mention expansion

Inserting a **group** link now expands `members:` into individual entries in `people:` (group name is not listed).

Works for:
- Selecting an existing group from the person picker
- Creating a new group via the member picker

Manifest version matches release tag (fixes BRAT version warning).

## Test plan

1. Insert an existing group (e.g. Ryersons) → `people:` lists members, body has `[[GroupName]]`
2. Create a new group with 2+ members → members appear in `people:`
3. Insert group when a member is already in `people:` → no duplicate

releases.author: sagersmith8
releases.description:
## Mention tracking settings toggle

- New setting: **Update people/locations frontmatter on insert** (default on)
- Turn off to insert body links only — no frontmatter changes

## Test plan

1. Settings → Journal Utils → disable mention tracking
2. Insert a person → body link only, no new `people` entry
3. Re-enable → insert another person → frontmatter updates again

releases.author: sagersmith8
releases.description:
## Journal mention tracking (preview)

Picker inserts now auto-update frontmatter on the active note:

- **Insert person link** → appends to `people:` (deduped)
- **Insert location link** → appends to `locations:` (deduped)
- Group inserts still add body link only (member expansion coming next)

Setting `mentionTrackingEnabled` defaults on (settings toggle UI in next release).

## Test plan

1. Open a daily note
2. Insert a person via picker → check Properties for `people`
3. Insert same person again → list unchanged
4. Insert a location → check `locations`

releases.author: sagersmith8
releases.description:
## v1.0 — Journal Utils

First production release for mobile journaling with people, groups, locations, and ghost mentions.

### Features
- **Insert person link** — people, groups, ghosts, create-new, convert-to-group
- **Insert location link** — locations, shared ghosts, create-new
- **Ghost actions** — ignore, create person/location/group, legacy note conversion
- **People migration** — preview + consolidate `people/` folder
- **Template bootstrap** — creates default vault templates if missing

### Skipped (post-v1 / separate PDD)
- Supercharged Links setup wizard (Step 11)
- Avatar decoration (Step 12)
- Auto frontmatter mention tracking (future PDD)

### Test plan
- [ ] BRAT update to 1.0.0
- [ ] Mobile toolbar: person + location commands
- [ ] End-to-end journaling session
- [ ] Templates created in vault on first load

releases.author: sagersmith8
releases.description:
## People folder migration

- **Migrate people folder to standard structure** command (folder-sync icon)
- Preview modal shows all moves and merges before anything runs
- Moves flat notes (`people/Graham.md` → `people/Graham/Graham.md`)
- Merges sub-notes into primary files with section headings
- Adds `type: person` frontmatter where missing
- Uses Obsidian rename so wikilinks update automatically
- Records `migrationCompletedAt` and migration log in settings

## Important

**Commit or sync your vault before running migration.** Review the preview carefully — this modifies many files at once.

## Test plan

- [ ] Commit vault via obsidian-git first
- [ ] Run migration command → preview shows expected moves/merges
- [ ] Confirm on a vault copy OR when plan looks correct
- [ ] Verify `people/Graham/Graham.md` exists with `type: person`
- [ ] Verify `[[Graham]]` still resolves in journal notes
- [ ] `people/groups/` left untouched

releases.author: sagersmith8
releases.description:
## Location picker

- **Insert location link** command (map-pin icon) for mobile toolbar
- Locations section with backlink-sorted `locations/{Name}/{Name}.md` notes
- Shared ghost pool with the person picker
- Create new location with template
- Ghost actions work from the location picker (including create location note)
- Flat legacy location notes under `locations/` are supported

## Test plan

- [ ] Add **Insert location link** to mobile toolbar
- [ ] Create location "Charleston" → file at `locations/Charleston/Charleston.md`
- [ ] Ghosts appear in both person and location pickers
- [ ] Ghost → Create location note works from location picker

releases.author: sagersmith8
releases.description:
## Fix: vault-root legacy notes

Ryerson and other notes at the vault root (e.g. `Ryerson.md`) were not detected as conflicts.

- Person lookup now uses Obsidian wikilink resolution (`[[Ryerson]]`) first
- Also checks vault root, `people/`, and nested paths
- **Convert to group** appears when any matching note exists, not just `people/` notes
- **Create new** is blocked when a matching note already exists
- Legacy notes appear in picker search results (muted styling)
- `createPerson` reuses existing note instead of creating a duplicate

## Before testing

If you already created a duplicate `people/Ryerson/Ryerson.md` from a prior attempt, delete it manually — keep the original `Ryerson.md` at vault root for conversion.

## Test plan

- [ ] Type `Ryerson` → see existing note + **Convert to group: Ryerson**
- [ ] No **Create new: Ryerson** option
- [ ] Convert flow moves note to `people/groups/Ryerson/Ryerson.md`

releases.author: sagersmith8
releases.description:
## Person → group conversion

- **Convert to group: {name}** appears in the person picker when a person note already exists
- Group creation detects an existing person note and asks to **Convert to group**
- Converts by moving the note to `people/groups/{Name}/{Name}.md`, adding `members:` frontmatter, and preserving existing body content
- Existing `[[Name]]` wikilinks are updated via Obsidian rename

## Test plan

- [ ] Type `Ryerson` in person picker → tap **Convert to group: Ryerson**
- [ ] Select members → **Create group** → confirm conversion
- [ ] Note moved to `people/groups/Ryerson/Ryerson.md` with `type: group` and members
- [ ] Original note body preserved
- [ ] Wikilink inserted in journal

releases.author: sagersmith8
releases.description:
## Groups

- **Groups section** in the person picker (backlink-sorted)
- **Create as group** ghost action opens a member picker with chips
- Search people and ghosts, add new members, confirm to create group + member notes
- Group notes include `members:` frontmatter with wikilink YAML list

## Test plan

- [ ] Existing groups appear in picker Groups section
- [ ] Tap group → inserts wikilink
- [ ] Ghost → Create as group → select 2+ members → group file created
- [ ] Group file has `type: group` and `members:` YAML wikilinks
- [ ] Missing member person notes are created automatically

releases.author: sagersmith8
releases.description:
## Ghost actions

Tapping a ghost mention in the person picker now opens an action menu:

- **Insert link only** — plain wikilink, no file created
- **Create person note** — creates profile and inserts link
- **Create location note** — creates location profile and inserts link
- **Ignore** — dismisses the ghost from future picker lists
- **Create as group** — stub for Step 8

## Test plan

- [ ] Tap a ghost → action modal appears with all buttons
- [ ] Ignore a name → it disappears on next picker open
- [ ] Create person from ghost → note created, link inserted, ghost gone
- [ ] Create location from ghost → note under `locations/`
- [ ] Settings → Clear ignored ghosts restores dismissed names
